_description: Schema reference for shared/pipeline_descriptions.json — the single, hand-authored source of pipeline description text. Shared across every UI variant (flowchart, cockpit) and every workspace: unlike pipeline_map.json (per-variant) and pipeline_cards.json (per-workspace-per-variant), this file has exactly ONE copy in the repo.
_generation_instructions: 1. This file is hand-authored by a human (Giulia), not AI-generated — agents should not invent or rewrite description text here without being asked to.
2. Keyed by pipeline `id` (the Python function name), the same join key used in pipeline_map.json and pipeline_cards.json.
3. A short paragraph is expected (a few sentences), not a one-liner — this supersedes the old per-node `description` field that used to live in pipeline_map.json.
5. Adding a new pipeline to the map? Add its id here too, or the app falls back to an empty description for that node.
_deploy_note: Each UI variant is deployed as its own OpenHEXA static webapp (separate origin), so app.js can only same-origin fetch('./pipeline_descriptions.json'). This repo file is the single source, but it must be copied into BOTH app/flowchart/ and app/cockpit/'s deploy bundle (files_json) at deploy time — same content, deployed twice. Never hand-edit the deployed copies independently; always edit shared/pipeline_descriptions.json and redeploy.

_schema.version: string — date (YYYY-MM-DD), bumped when descriptions change

descriptions.<pipeline_id>: string — hand-authored paragraph shown in the sidebar for this node
